ground_truth_fix: Declare the map in `SEC("maps")` and preserve the loader-generated map pointer relocation.

candidate_repairs.patch_hint: Pass the map object itself as this argument, not a pointer to a map value. Preserve the loader-generated map reference so the verifier sees map_ptr.
candidate_repairs.rationale: The verifier sees R1 as a map-value pointer (map_value), but this call requires a map pointer.

evidence.detail: The verifier sees R1 as a map-value pointer (map_value), but this call requires a map pointer.
No earlier dominating proof-establishing branch or narrowing was found.
